For MSMEs & Startups

Enabling Indian MSMEs with world-class best practices

We take the best business practices from around the world, contextualise them to Indian realities, and put them in the hands of India's growth businesses — preparing them for the imminent India Wave. Indian companies should disproportionately influence world business. We're here to make that happen.

Take Free AI AssessmentBrowse Marketplace

We get it

Your challenges are our design brief

"No time for 6-month projects"

Sprint-based engagements — results in 4–6 weeks.

"Can't afford Big 4 consulting fees"

Modular pricing from ₹999. Pay only for what you use.

"Don't know where AI fits in the business"

Free AI Readiness Assessment with sector benchmarks.

"Growth stalled but don't know why"

Diagnostic frameworks to pinpoint bottlenecks fast.

"Worried about quality at scale"

ISO-aligned QMS templates and lean playbooks included.

"Too many tools, no clear strategy"

One platform. AI advisor + frameworks + experts on demand.

How It Works

From problem to solution in 3 steps

01

Start with Growth Assets

Pick up diagnostic kits, best-practice playbooks, and ready-to-use frameworks from the marketplace. Cost-effective, immediate impact — no consultant required.

02

Power Up with Agentic AI

Layer in AI to automate, optimise, and accelerate. From AI assessments to autonomous agents, build the skills and tools that multiply your team's output.

03

Accelerate with 1-on-1 Consulting

When you need a focused push on a specific growth challenge, bring in our experts. Deep-dive engagements and hands-on implementation to move the trajectory.

MSME Packages

Transparent pricing, no hidden costs

Starter

₹4,999/one-time

Perfect for MSMEs just getting started with structured frameworks.

  • 3 marketplace assets of your choice
  • AI Readiness Assessment report
  • Email support for 30 days
  • Sector benchmarking data

Most Popular

Growth

₹14,999/quarter

For businesses ready to transform operations and unlock growth.

  • 10 marketplace assets (any category)
  • 1:1 specialist consultation (2 hrs)
  • Custom AI readiness roadmap
  • Priority chatbot support
  • Quarterly review session
  • Sector-specific benchmark report

Enterprise

Custom

For MSMEs scaling fast who need dedicated advisory and custom tools.

  • Dedicated specialist team
